card_description: Simon Magus (Hebrew (Shimon): "Hearing/hearkening") is a historical figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the biblical tradition, Simon Magus is samaritan magician in acts; proto-gnostic figure. Key Gnostic precursor figure discussed in PKD's theological investigations. Context: "Conclusion of the letter to Henry Korman."

linked_segments.summary: Conclusion of the letter to Henry Korman. Dick discusses the alchemical transmutation as a spontaneous, irreversible psychic process and links his "teletype" communication with Erasmus to the AI syste
linked_segments.title: U_Henry_02.txt

reference.brief: Samaritan magician in Acts; proto-Gnostic figure
reference.significance: Key Gnostic precursor figure discussed in PKD's theological investigations
